data.body: E5c DONE (commit e6e645ae): relocated transition/claim locked critical section from _engine/ticket_txn.py into importable rebar._commands.txn (transition_core/claim_core). Cores RAISE (ConcurrencyMismatch=10, CommandError=1/2) instead of sys.exit; reuse rebar._store.lock (dual-leg fcntl+mkdir, stiff-mop-lane fix preserved) + event_append.event_filename + rebar.reducer. _engine/ticket_txn.py now a thin bash-leg shim (re-exits 10/1/2, preserves positional argv) until E7. Byte-parity preserved (unsorted json.dump, NOT canonical sorted — P1.0 scope); golden-bytes guard added. flock structural guard repointed to new module. GREEN: 51 unit + 4 concurrency-matrix (integration) + 369 interfaces + 4/4 flock guard. NEXT: in-process transition wrapper cutover (port ticket-transition.sh logic incl. open-children guard + newly_unblocked port from ticket-unblock.py) + reopen.
